channel.title: Notes from Laura Creates Studio
channel.description: Short notes on lettering, brand work, and studio life in Dearborn.

item.title: Why I still sketch letters on paper first
item.description: A quick case for warming up with a brush pen before the cursor ever moves.

item.title: Packaging that survives the shelf
item.description: Three small dieline habits that keep a label crisp from proof to print.

item.title: Setting a lettering rate without flinching
item.description: How a mentor coffee and a podcast nudged my commission floor up.

item.title: Five favorite paper stocks for gouache
item.description: What I reach for when a wash needs to stay clean and a line needs to hold.
